home.gap_body: Today's chat frameworks stop at Markdown. When an agent needs the user to pick a database, fill a form, or confirm a deletion, the conversation stalls. AI Business UI gives the agent a way to render structured input — using nothing more than JSON.
home.contract_body: The renderer looks up the component by name, validates the props with Zod, and renders the matching React component.
home.feature_0: 9 components: radio, checkbox, select, form, wizard, card, table, upload.
home.feature_1: A registry — add a new component in one line.
home.feature_2: Zod-validated props; TypeScript types inferred end-to-end.
home.feature_3: Assistant UI & Vercel AI SDK adapters shipped in-box.

components.title: Components
components.subtitle: Each card below renders an example schema. Interact with the UI; the result appears below.

examples.title: Examples
examples.subtitle: Four worked agent flows. Each example shows the user prompt, the agent's emitted schema, and the value the user submits back.

assistant_ui.title: Assistant UI adapter
assistant_ui.subtitle: This page mirrors how an Assistant UI chat thread would render a show_ui tool result via the adapter.

ai_sdk.title: Vercel AI SDK adapter
ai_sdk.subtitle: Renders any data-ui or tool-show_ui part inside an AI-SDK message via the AIMessageUI adapter.

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: Paste any UIAction schema and see it rendered.
